g.text: BFF + GraphQL hybrid — one REST call out, one federated query in
Mobile client always speaks REST. The BFF either orchestrates 12 service calls by hand (top) or delegates orchestration to an internal GraphQL federation gateway (bottom).
(a) Hand-coded fan-out — BFF maintains 12 service call signatures
BFF speaks gRPC/REST to each service. N call signatures to maintain, N+1 risks, per-call retries, manual error merge.
(b) Federated GraphQL — BFF sends ONE query, gateway resolves all subgraphs
BFF builds one GraphQL query. Gateway plans dependency order, fans out in parallel to all subgraphs, assembles one JSON tree.
